subject: Two armored knights mounted on large beasts — one on a boar-like creature, one on a horse — charging forward side by side
description: Two armored humanoid knights charge forward in formation, filling the foreground. The left figure rides a large boar-like creature with tusks and prominent horns; the right figure rides a pale horse. Both wear heavy blue-gold plate armor and carry weapons raised for battle — one holds a mace, the other a smaller thrown weapon. The sky behind them is pale blue with scattered clouds. The composition is wide and dynamic, conveying momentum and coordinated assault. No faces are clearly distinguishable at this resolution beyond rough features.
foreground: two mounted knights in blue-gold armor charging toward viewer
background: open sky, pale blue, scattered clouds
